settings.headline: Sell card codes, accounts, and downloads with a storefront built for delivery.
settings.subtitle: Browse by category, confirm stock before payment, and keep every delivery inside the order center instead of losing it in support chat.

items.question: Where do I get my code or account after payment?
items.answer: The storefront writes delivery details to the order center, so buyers can return to the same order page instead of searching through email threads.

items.question: Do digital goods need shipping details?
items.answer: Digital-only orders do not require shipping. Shipping fields are only used when the cart contains a physical or hybrid item.

items.question: What happens if fulfillment is delayed?
items.answer: The order remains the source of truth. Buyers can reopen it to check for updates, and operators can still complete delivery manually when needed.
